subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy greatness and Thy majesty, then by Thy loftiness and Thy glory, to protect Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بعظمتک و جلالک ثم رفعتک و اجلالک ان تحفظ عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
